title: How to sponsor a refugee - Canada.ca
content:
## How to sponsor a refugee
Canadians can sponsor refugees abroad to come and live in Canada permanently.
Refugee sponsorship usually lasts 1 year. As a sponsor you’ll:
- support them financially to cover things like housing, food, clothing and furniture
- help them find work, sign up for school and get around your community
You can’t sponsor a refugee on your own. You must be part of one of the following groups:

## Sponsorship agreement holder Open
You’re an organization that wants to sign an agreement with the Canadian government to sponsor a certain number of refugees each year.

## Group of five Paused
You’re a group of at least 5 Canadian citizens or permanent residents who want to sponsor refugees to resettle in your community.

## Community sponsor Paused
You’re an organization, association or corporation that wants to sponsor refugees to resettle in your community.

## If you want to sponsor a refugee to resettle in Quebec
You must apply through the Government of Quebec.

### A look at a refugee’s journey to Canada
Know what to expect and what services and support are available to resettled refugees in Canada.
